name: Wolfgang
personality: Wolfgang takes joy in terrorizing civilians with his ferocity and evil music. When irritated, he won't hesitate in challenging the authority of those stronger than him. He has a short fuse, but seems to care for his fellow Doom Raiders, referring to them at one point as his "pack" when a few of them were captured by the Skylanders . Despite his aggressive behavior, he is said to be optimistic of being rewarded for his music even when people don't appreciate the cacophony and flee in terror. [ 3 ] He is a werewolf that can make even other werewolves run in fear. [ 4 ] His wish to be recognized as a musician was the tipping point for him to turn over a new leaf. After his rehabilitation, Wolfgang is still somewhat agitated and aggressive in battle, but now towards those on the side of evil.
